nodes.label: AI as drafting assistant for emails
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable for report drafting from scratch
nodes.grounding_span: AI performs email drafting tasks fairly well, concise and in professional tone. When it comes to report drafting, it can sometimes misunderstand the requirements

nodes.label: AI as debugging assistant
nodes.grounding_span: Most frustrating is when AI comes in to help write a code or debug and issue, it says that the issue would be fixable with a certain code, but the issue still persists

nodes.label: AI as search tool for simple queries
nodes.grounding_span: I sometimes use it to search for simple issues such as what does certain terms means in insurance context

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: back and forth most of the time, to ensure the content is satisfactory

nodes.label: AI as time-saving tool
nodes.label_negative: AI inability to free up time due to poor performance
nodes.grounding_span: Hopefully AI could perform tasks better and it can be better integrated into my work to free up my time

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for email drafting
nodes.grounding_span: AI performs email drafting tasks fairly well, concise and in professional tone

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for drafting
nodes.grounding_span: it can sometimes misunderstand the requirements, hence works better only focusing on paraphrasing the content rather than starting form scratch, which can be slightly annoying

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for debugging
nodes.grounding_span: Most frustrating is when AI comes in to help write a code or debug and issue, it says that the issue would be fixable with a certain code, but the issue still persists

nodes.label: Openness to increasing AI use in future
nodes.grounding_span: I'm fairly happy for AI to handle more task if they are capable off it

nodes.label: Optimism about future AI integration
nodes.grounding_span: Hopefully AI could perform tasks better and it can be better integrated into my work to free up my time

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with limited back-and-forth
nodes.grounding_span: back and forth most of the time, to ensure the content is satisfactory

nodes.label: Blank slate approach with AI first draft
nodes.grounding_span: I usually start with a blank slate, describing the context in 2-3 liners, and then obtain the first draft from AI
